data.title: Add RED structural tests for batched confirmation to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
data.description:
Add 3 new structural-boundary test functions to tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh that are RED against the current SKILL.md and will turn GREEN after story 2ea1-8454's Phase 2.75 replacement.

Tests to add:
- test_batched_file_confirmation: greps 'single.*confirmation' (absent from current SKILL.md)
- test_file_summary_before_confirmation: greps 'summary.*artifact' (absent from current SKILL.md)
- test_partial_failure_handling: greps 'partial.*fail' (absent from current SKILL.md)

Also:
- Place 3 new calls immediately before print_summary (after test_diff_existing_files)
- Update header comment: 'Validates (14 named assertions)' → 'Validates (19 named assertions)'
- Append all 5 missing test names to header listing (test_artifact_review_before_writing, test_diff_existing_files, + 3 new)
- Update status comment: 'First 7 tests PASS...last 7 tests are RED' → 'First 16 tests PASS...last 3 tests are RED'
- Append 3 RED markers to .test-index (format: source_file:test_file [function_name]):
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_batched_file_confirmation]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_file_summary_before_confirmation]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_partial_failure_handling]

testing_mode: UPDATE
Files: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh, .test-index
